cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Namaste Sakshi ji, welcome to Paytm Payments Bank! I'm here to help you set up autopay for your utility bills. Achha, let's get started, sir!

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, I want to set up autopay for my electricity bill. Can you guide me through the process, please?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Of course, Sakshi ji! You can do it easily through our official net banking portal. I'll walk you through the steps. First, please log in to your account on the Paytm website.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great job, Sakshi ji! Now, click on the 'Bill Pay' section and select your electricity bill provider. Then, choose the autopay option and confirm.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Alright, I've done that. Is that it?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Almost, Sakshi ji! Just review the details and confirm. You'll receive a confirmation message once it's set up. You're all done, sir! Your autopay is now active.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thank you so much for your help! I really appreciate it.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 84s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: Setting up Autopay for Bills: An agent assists a customer in setting up an autopay mandate for a utility bill through the official net banking portal.
